title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core exposing read, write, edit, and bash operations, designed to be extended with custom or community extensions. It supports integration with various language models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, offering a cost-effective alternative to frontier model APIs.
